Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.analyst

Interface IProofReferencesAnalyst

All Known Implementing Classes:
ClassAxiomAndInvariantProofReferencesAnalyst, ContractProofReferencesAnalyst, MethodBodyExpandProofReferencesAnalyst, MethodCallProofReferencesAnalyst, ProgramVariableReferencesAnalyst
public interface IProofReferencesAnalyst

Instances of this class are used to compute IProofReference for a given Node based on the applied rule. Each instance of this class has the knowledge to extract the references for a single rule or a group of similar rules.

The complete extraction is done via static methods of ProofReferenceUtil.

See Also:
  • ProofReferenceUtil
  • IProofReference

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>>
    computeReferences(Node node, Services services)
    Computes the IProofReference for the given Node which can be null or an empty set if the applied rule is not supported by this IProofReferencesAnalyst.

  • Method Details

    • computeReferences

      LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeReferences(Node node, Services services)
      Computes the IProofReference for the given Node which can be null or an empty set if the applied rule is not supported by this IProofReferencesAnalyst.
      Parameters:
      node - The Node to compute its IProofReferences.
      services - The Services to use.
      Returns:
      The found IProofReference or null/empty set if the applied rule is not supported.
